news.title: STAT+: Competition for obesity drugs, clinical blind spots, and more news from ADA
news.summary: You're reading the web edition of STAT's ADA in 30 Seconds, from the American Diabetes Association's annual conference.

news.title: STAT+: New data may cast doubt on competitiveness of Boehringer’s obesity drug
news.summary: Boehringer Ingelheim’s obesity drug showed promise in cutting liver fat, but it was less impressive at overall weight loss, new data shows.

news.title: STAT+: Triple hormone receptors, a monthly obesity drug, and a bittersweet ending
news.summary: You're reading the web edition of STAT's ADA in 30 Seconds, from the American Diabetes Association's annual conference in New Orleans.

news.title: STAT+: Lilly shares safety, tolerability data on its next-gen obesity drug
news.summary: Eli Lilly presented new safety and tolerability data on retatrutide at the annual meeting of the American Diabetes Association on Saturday.

news.title: STAT+: Detailed data show Pfizer’s monthly obesity drug continues to show potential
news.summary: Detailed data from a midstage study offered further evidence that the obesity drug Pfizer acquired from the biotech Metsera could be dosed monthly.

news.title: Opinion: I led the U.S. CDC response to the 2014 Ebola epidemic. The new outbreak needs massive, immediate, meticulous action
news.summary: “Ebola is an unforgiving enemy,” writes Tom Frieden, who led the U.S. CDC response to the 2014-2016 Ebola outbreak.

news.title: Opinion: How the Amish think about vaccines, health care costs, and much more
news.summary: There may be nearly 2 million Amish Americans by 2075. That has large public health implications.

news.title: Weekly Rundown: Trump signs AI executive order; Health Catalyst to sell Vitalware for $147M
news.summary: Stay up to date on the latest in health tech, digital health and health AI news with this weekly brief.

news.title: Healthcare Dealmakers—WakeMed to join Atrium Health, Qualtrics closes $6.8B Press Ganey deal and more
news.summary: Sanford Health moves to add North Memorial Health, Sutter Health and Allina Health sign a definitive agreement and more merger and acquisition news from May.

news.title: Industry Voices—A healthcare experience that is as seamless as it is soulful
news.summary: Patients and their loved ones are too often navigating a fragmented system while carrying the emotional weight that comes with a diagnosis or uncertainty, writes Ascension SVP and Chief Experience Officer Carol Campbell.

news.title: As pro-life pressure ramps up on Trump, FDA is investigating safety of abortion pill: WSJ
news.summary: The FDA is going forward with an investigation into the safety of the abortion pill mifepristone, an initiative that could allow the Trump administration to impose restrictions on its use, The Wall Street Journal reports.

news.title: Fullspan Health debuts Healthline AI companion to connect consumers to medical content and providers
news.summary: The conversational AI agent pulls information from Fullspan’s medically reviewed properties, including Healthline and Psych Central.

news.title: WellSpan Health strikes strategic partnership with Philips to deploy, co-develop new healthcare tech
news.summary: WellSpan Health inked a seven-year strategic alliance with Philips to drive advanced imaging technology across its network and co-develop new healthcare technology.

news.title: Ixlayer rolls out digital acute pain management platform in collaboration with Vertex Pharmaceuticals
news.summary: The platform—dubbed Informed Pain Care—allows patients to connect with licensed clinicians virtually, providing symptom-based intake and eligibility screenings and treatment options.

news.title: Small businesses feel the squeeze as healthcare costs rise: Morgan Health
news.summary: As healthcare costs continue to rise, smaller businesses are particularly vulnerable to the pressure, according to a new Morgan Health report.

news.title: Ascension closes its $3.9B AmSurg purchase following FTC's all-clear
news.summary: The nonprofit health system is now the country's third-largest ambulatory surgery center (ASC) platform, with more than 300 such locations.

news.title: ScionHealth sends 8 community hospitals to Lifepoint Health
news.summary: The deal between the nationwide sister systems grows Lifepoint Health to a network of 68 community hospital campuses, and allows ScionHealth to increase focus on its core business of specialty hospital services.

news.title: Georgetown study: 2M children have dropped out of Medicaid, CHIP since January 2025
news.summary: There are 2 million fewer children enrolled in either Medicaid or the Children's Health Insurance Program compared to January 2025, according to a new report.

news.title: Thyme Care expands cancer survivorship program to provide longitudinal support
news.summary: Thyme Care has expanded its cancer survivorship program, called Next Chapter Care, to provide a personalized, longitudinal approach to survivorship support.

news.title: Managing complexity across biopharma modalities
news.summary: SK pharmteco CEO Joerg Ahlgrimm discusses complexity, global pressure and drug development speed.

news.title: Why AI is changing clinical development
news.summary: PhaseV CEO Raviv Pryluk explains how AI is reshaping trial design and execution.

news.title: Could engaging the immune system improve AML outcomes?
news.summary: With unmet need still high in AML, new approaches are exploring whether engaging immune responses could help improve long-term disease control.

news.title: ADA: Tolerability ‘not to be underappreciated’ in Roche, Zealand’s amylin obesity prospect
news.summary: As the American Diabetes Association 2026 Scientific Sessions kicked off in New Orleans over the weekend, Zealand Pharma and its recent commercial and development partner Roche helped get the show rolling with a deep dive into their amylin analog petrelintide.

news.title: ADA: Lilly pulls back curtain on impressive triple-G efficacy in patients with obesity, diabetes
news.summary: Even as Zepbound fires on all cylinders and Foundayo gets off to the races in the oral market, Eli Lilly is keenly aware that the one-size-fits-all approach to obesity and diabetes treatment pioneered by early GLP-1s will soon be obsolete.

news.title: ADA: Pfizer pads case for berobenatide in obesity, adding validation to Metsera buy
news.summary: On the heels of a strong showing for the drug earlier this year, Pfizer is padding the case for the GLP-1 receptor agonist it picked up in its $10 billion purchase of obesity biotech Metsera.

news.title: ‘It looks like this hypothesis will pan out’: Cullinan unveils data building case for autoimmune TCEs
news.summary: When it comes to turning T-cell therapies toward autoimmune diseases, CAR-Ts have been leading the way. But another red-hot modality is also beginning to show potential in the clinic.

news.title: Affibody gets izokibep ‘back on track’ while seeking ‘new home’ after drug’s Acelyrin rejection
news.summary: Affibody may not have expected to be working on izokibep again, but the Swedish biotech hasn’t wasted an opportunity to showcase the inflammation drug’s potential to prospective partners.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: Fulcrum cuts 85% of staff; Novartis trims research team
news.summary: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: Chutes & Ladders—AstraZeneca adds FDA cell and gene veteran
news.summary: Longtime FDA leader Lola Fashoyin-Aje, M.D., is adapting to a new role at AstraZeneca as vice president and head of cell therapy regulatory science and strategy. Fashoyin-Aje is well-positioned to help the British pharma giant in this field, given she spent nearly 12 years at the FDA, with her tenure culminating in directing the clinical evaluation of cell and gene therapies.

news.title: How RA Capital is offering its biotechs ‘Chinese clinical expertise in a box’
news.summary: Rather than leave the work of developing relationships in China to individual companies, the firm launched an initiative called RA Capital Swiftbridge in mid-2025.

news.title: Insulet debuts latest enhancements to popular Omnipod insulin delivery system
news.summary: Insulet, the diabetes device maker, debuted upgrades to its popular Omnipod 5 tubeless automated insulin delivery system.

papers.title: The Road Ahead in Autonomous Driving: The KITScenes Multimodal Dataset
papers.summary: Existing autonomous driving datasets have enabled major progress, but fall short in sensor fidelity, map completeness, or geographic diversity. We present KITScenes Multimodal, a European dataset built around high-fidelity sensors and maps. Our fully synchronized sensor suite combines high-resolution global-shutter cameras, long-range lidar beyond 400m, 4D imaging radar, and redundant GNSS/INS localization. Our HD maps are, to our knowledge, the most complete of any sensor dataset, validated through autonomous driving trials on open-source software. For the first time in a public dataset, all

papers.title: Quality-Guided Semi-Supervised Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Training accurate medical image segmentation models requires large amounts of densely annotated data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. Semi-supervised learning (SSL) alleviates this by learning from both abundant unlabeled data and limited labeled data. However, most modern SSL methods rely on pseudolabels for unlabeled data, and typically assess their reliability through model confidence or uncertainty, measures that are self-referential and lack explicit grounding in segmentation quality. Instead, we propose a quality-guided SSL framework that trains a dedicated network to estim
